name: SmartBatPlusG2
comment:
The Smart BatPlusG2 is a high-end version of the iconic Smart Bat uplighters designed with enhanced output and battery performance, IP65 with a stunning new look.
The clever mechanical design of the Smart BatPlusG2 allows turning the unit from an uplighter into a spot/flood light by combining filters, using the suspension yoke or floor bracket without compromising the aesthetics of the fixture.
The Smart BatPlus G2 introduces new features such as interchangeable batteries and easy covers with multiple colours, making it possible to change its look as desired.  
The 4x20W RGB + Warm White LED emitters are Spektra™ calibrated and guarantee incredibly high-quality white CCT reproduction (CRI>93) and boosted output when operated directly through mains.
The Smart BatPlusG2 is very user-friendly - it can be used wirelessly with a built-in battery, CRMX/W-DMX and RDM control, or wired through the PSU and XLR connectors (bypassing the battery).

revision.text: Rev 005 - FW 1_1_05_1 and above - Basic2 mode added
